message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam linetype ortho
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

package "«aggregate» Product" as AggProduct {
  class Product <<entity>> as Agg_Product_Product
  class ShortDescription <<C>> as Agg_Product_ShortDescription
  class LongDescription <<C>> as Agg_Product_LongDescription
  class TechnicalDescription <<C>> as Agg_Product_TechnicalDescription

  class Barcode <<C>> as Agg_Product_Barcode
  class ProductionCode <<C>> as Agg_Product_ProductionCode
  class PriceWithoutVAT <<C>> as Agg_Product_PriceWithoutVAT
  class PriceWithVAT <<C>> as Agg_Product_PriceWithVAT

  class Reference <<C>> as Agg_Product_Reference
  class Weight <<C>> as Agg_Product_Weight
  class Volume <<C>> as Agg_Product_Volume
  class Photo <<C>> as Agg_Product_Photo

  class BrandName <<C>> as Agg_Product_BrandName
}

package "«aggregate» Category" as AggCategory {
  class Category <<E>> as Agg_Category_Category
  class AlphanumericCode <<C>> as Agg_Category_AlphanumericCode

  class Description <<C>> as Agg_Category_Description
  class SuperCategory <<C>> as Agg_Category_SuperCategory
}

class ProductEntity <<entity>> as ProductEntity {
  +uniqueInternalCode
}

class ShortDescriptionVO <<value object>> as VO_ShortDescription
class LongDescriptionVO <<value object>> as VO_LongDescription
class TechnicalDescriptionVO <<value object>> as VO_TechnicalDescription
class BarcodeVO <<value object>> as VO_Barcode
class ProductionCodeVO <<value object>> as VO_ProductionCode
class PriceWithoutVATVO <<value object>> as VO_PriceWithoutVAT
class PriceWithVATVO <<value object>> as VO_PriceWithVAT
class ReferenceVO <<value object>> as VO_Reference
class WeightVO <<value object>> as VO_Weight
class VolumeVO <<value object>> as VO_Volume
class PhotoVO <<value object>> as VO_Photo
class BrandNameVO <<value object>> as VO_BrandName

class CategoryEntity <<entity>> as CategoryEntity
class AlphanumericCodeVO <<value object>> as VO_AlphanumericCode
class DescriptionVO <<value object>> as VO_Description
class SuperCategoryVO <<value object>> as VO_SuperCategory

ProductEntity "1" -- "1" VO_ShortDescription : characterized by
ProductEntity "1" -- "1" VO_LongDescription : characterized by
ProductEntity "1" -- "1" VO_TechnicalDescription : characterized by
ProductEntity "1" -- "1" VO_Barcode : characterized by
ProductEntity "1" -- "1" VO_ProductionCode : characterized by
ProductEntity "1" -- "0..1" VO_PriceWithoutVAT : identified by
ProductEntity "1" -- "0..1" VO_PriceWithVAT : identified by
ProductEntity "1" -- "1" VO_Reference : associated
ProductEntity "1" -- "1" VO_Weight : associated
ProductEntity "1" -- "1" VO_Volume : characterized by
ProductEntity "1" -- "1" VO_Photo : described
ProductEntity "1" -- "1" VO_BrandName : made by

ProductEntity "1" -- "1" CategoryEntity : organized by

CategoryEntity "1" -- "1" VO_AlphanumericCode : identified by
CategoryEntity "1" -- "1" VO_Description : characterized by
CategoryEntity "1" -- "1" VO_SuperCategory : belongs to
@enduml
